# pfsense_interface_groups (Data Source)

Retrieves all [interface groups](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/interfaces/groups.html). Interface groups allow applying firewall rules to multiple interfaces at once.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_interface_groups" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `interface_groups` (Attributes List) List of interface groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interface_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--interface_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interface_groups`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `members` (List of String) List of logical interface names (e.g. 'lan', 'opt1') that are members of this group.
- `name` (String) Name of the interface group. Must be unique, maximum 15 characters.
